category: Roles or Components in a Classical Orchestra
explanation: Violin, Flute, Trumpet, and Cello are all musical instruments that produce sound within a classical orchestra. A Conductor directs the orchestra but does not play an instrument as part of the ensemble.

Nefertiti, Hatshepsut, Cleopatra VII, and Twosret were all prominent female rulers or highly influential queens in Ancient Egypt. Boudica was a queen of the British Iceni tribe who led an uprising against the Roman Empire.
Melt, Evaporate, Freeze, and Boil are all terms describing physical phase transitions of matter (changes of state). Ignite describes a chemical process of combustion.
